bioText: I like helping juniors navigate ambiguity. 10 years in distributed systems at fintech.
Career growth and interview prep. I prefer structured weekly check-ins.
Research background. I mentor people moving from academia to industry.
Senior Java architect. I focus on clean code and system design.
Platform engineer. I help teams adopt CI/CD and cloud-native infrastructure.
iOS developer. Swift, SwiftUI, and app architecture. Former startup CTO.
VP of Product. I mentor on leadership, stakeholder management, and career transitions.
Security engineer. I mentor on secure coding, threat modeling, and compliance.
Frontend architect. Vue, React, and large-scale SPA design. I enjoy mentoring on design systems.
